title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry, UniFi Protect/Access entry terminal
description: The Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry is an elegant UniFi Protect/Access video intercom featuring a 12MP main camera (20fps, 100°) , 8MP secondary package camera (3fps, 66°), touch display , IR illumination for night vision up to 5m , IP55 rating, IK7 vandal resistance and built-in microphones and a speaker for two-way audio with noise cancellation . Power and network connectivity are provided via (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port for connection to a network running UniFi Protect or to a UniFi Access Hub NFC card/keyfob PIN code QR code Face recognition Apple/Google Wallet Via mobile application Locally on UA-Intercom-Viewer Device Mount Angled mount Mounting hardware
